description: **(S)** Lower `MAX_TEST_ITERATIONS` from 10 to 7 and reduce test convergence threshold from 3 to 2 identical failures in `implement-issue-orchestrator.sh` (lines 29, 1772)
**(S)** Add a `MAX_VALIDATION_FIX_ITERATIONS=2` constant and separate counter to cap validation-driven fix cycles independently from test failure fixes in `run_test_loop` (lines 1829-1846)

**(M)** Add environment error detection function that checks failure descriptions for Redis/DB/HTTP 500 patterns and skips fix agent dispatch when all failures are environment-related (around lines 1729-1765)
**(S)** Add explicit scope constraint to test validation fix prompt: "Only fix quality issues in test files that correspond to PR-changed implementation files" (line 1846 fix prompt)
**(S)** Update BATS tests to cover new constants and environment error detection logic
